data.description: We have no indication yet that this will be a second round of talks. As of now, only Pakistan and Iran have confirmed a meeting with each other - NY Post Reporter.

data.title: Mobile Infrastructure Corporation Announces Honolulu Sale, Retiring Mortgage Debt and Reducing Line of Credit with Proceeds
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Mobile Infrastructure Corporation (NASDAQ: BEEP), the sole publicly traded owner of parking infrastructure in the US, finalized the sale of its parking facility in Honolulu, Hawaii. The company disclosed that this transaction allowed for the repayment of a portion of its Preferred Line of Credit along with mortgage debt.

data.title: Pritchard Industries Expands Aviation Leadership Team With Two Key Appointments
data.description: A prominent national facilities services company recently appointed Kevin Barton as President, Aviation, and Amy Sebastian as Vice President, Aviation. This announcement was made in New York on April 24, 2026. Pritchard Industries specializes in offering comprehensive facility and engineering services. Kevin Barton and Amy Sebastian bring a wealth of industry experience to their new roles. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing the company's operations in the aviation sector.

data.title: +8 Partners Names Wendy Kao as Deputy Chair
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 24, 2026, Wendy Kao was named Deputy Chair of +8 Partners, a network of global insurance firms. Previously the Chief Representative for Rare Earth Insurance Partners in Taiwan since August 2018, she will retain that position while taking on her new role.

data.title: Rollins College Appoints Vice President For External Relations And General Counsel
data.description: A new development has been unveiled by Rollins College in Winter Park, Florida, as they reveal the selection of Antionette Marbray to take on the roles of Vice President for External Relations and General Counsel. Commencing her new responsibilities on July 20, 2026, Marbray, who currently holds the position of Vice President for Legal, is set to bring her expertise to the institution.

data.title: BingX TradFi Elevates with TradingView, Bringing Pro-Grade Analysis to Multi-Asset Trading
data.description: In Panama City on April 24, 2026, BingX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3-AI firm, revealed the incorporation of TradingView into its BingX TradFi suite. This move represents a notable advancement in linking high-quality market analysis with a cohesive multi-asset platform.

data.title: From a Plant App to a Lifestyle Powerhouse: Palmstreet Celebrates Six Years of Redefining Live Shopping with "Cheers to 6 Years" Event
data.description: A popular livestream platform, celebrating its sixth anniversary from April 22 to 26, is offering almost $200 worth of buyer coupons. The platform has expanded its category universe to include fashion, beauty, lifestyle, and toys among others. This news comes from New York on April 24, 2026, through a press release by Palmstreet. The platform's website is palmstreet.app.

data.title: Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute Advances Oncology Care Through Expert Collaboration and Innovative Exchange at Exclusive Event
data.description: Experts in the field of cancer care have gathered to exchange the latest information, new treatment approaches, and cooperative ideas for improving personalized cancer treatment in community facilities in Fort Myers, Florida. The event, taking place on April 24, 2026, is being organized in collaboration with Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC.

data.title: Tile of Spain Manufacturers Showcase Modern Heritage at Coverings 2026
data.description: In Miami on April 24, 2026, Coverings 2026 took place, known as North America's leading international tile and stone exhibition with a significant presence of nearly 60 Spanish manufacturers from Tile of Spain. This event served as a hub of inspiration with a large representation of companies showcasing their products. The exhibition was a gathering point for industry professionals and enthusiasts, showcasing the latest trends and innovations in tile and stone products from around the world.

data.title: Decisions of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB
data.description: The Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB took place on April 24, 2026. At the meeting, the independent auditors' report, the Company’s Consolidated Management Report for 2025, and other relevant documents were presented for the shareholders' review.

data.title: Annual information of ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB
data.description: The ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB has released their 2025 annual report including audited consolidated financial statements, an independent auditor's report, the consolidated management report, and additional documents.

data.title: Farmers and Merchants Bancshares, Inc. Reports Earnings of $1.8 Million, or $0.56 per Share, for the Three Months Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: In Hampstead, Maryland, on April 24, 2026, Farmers and Merchants Bancshares, Inc. reported a significant increase in financial performance. The company, which oversees Farmers and Merchants Bank, disclosed that net income for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, reached $1.8 million. This translates to earnings of $0.56 per common share (basic and diluted). In comparison, the net income for the same period in 2025 stood at $1.2 million, or $0.37 per common share. This marks a notable 57% rise in net income year over year. Additionally, the return on average equity for the first quarter of 2026 was 11.03%, up from 8.22% in 2025. Moreover, the return on average assets for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, was 0.84%, a considerable increase from the 0.57% reported for the corresponding period in 2025.

data.title: The Jewelers Board of Trade Holds Annual Elections
data.description: Warwick, Rhode Island - On April 24, 2026, the Jewelers Board of Trade disclosed the election results for Officers and Directors at its recent meetings. The appointments were made during the Annual Meeting on February 11, 2026, and Board Meeting on March 25, 2026. The Board selected new Officers and Directors to join its ranks.
